summary: Backend-only testing of merged MSS x Assure Audit Utilities (Clause 44 + 43B(h) MSME). Wrote pytest suite /app/backend/tests/test_merged_backend.py covering root, auth (positive+negative), Clients CRUD, Clause 44 /runs, and full MSME flow (session create -> yearend upload -> profiles upload -> payments upload -> compute -> force_fifo FIFO label bug verification -> results -> xlsx export -> template -> cleanup). 22/22 tests PASS. FIFO Forced duplicate-label bug fix verified: when force_fifo=true, audit_rows.due_date_basis reads 'Voucher Date + 45 days' (never 'FIFO Forced'), and fifo_forced_count>=1. Fixture-based deterministic assertions held: bill_count=4, unique_ledgers=3, profile_count=3, payment_count=3, exempt_count>=2, at least one disallowed (Acme INV/002 late payment).

minor.issue: Review request listed PUT update and DELETE, but controller exposes PATCH only and has no DELETE route. Tests used PATCH for update and fell back to PATCH archived=true for delete. Consider adding explicit DELETE for a cleaner API contract (or update the requirements doc if archive-only is intentional).

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add DELETE /api/clients/{client_id} endpoint, or update spec to clarify clients are archived (not hard-deleted). Non-blocking for deployment.
OPTIONAL: Remove or align pytest.ini 'asyncio_mode' unknown-option warning (cosmetic).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — migrate to lifespan context manager when convenient (non-blocking).

msme43bh/service.compute_disallowance is ~170 lines in one function; consider splitting (exempt check, due-date resolution, FIFO match, status decision) for readability and unit-testing. Functionally correct.
Clients router _public() is good (excludes _id). All other Mongo reads use projection {'_id': 0} correctly.
Auth dep parses ISO expires_at robustly. Good.
msme controller consistently re-checks auth via _auth() — OK but slightly verbose; Depends(get_current_user) would be idiomatic.
seed_data_creation: Tests create a transient single-division client (file_number prefixed 'TEST-<uuid>') and one MSME session; both cleaned up in test_zz_cleanup_* at end of run (session hard-deleted, client archived).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use pytest /app/backend/tests/test_merged_backend.py as the regression suite. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL must be set (already in frontend/.env). Fixtures live at /app/tests/fixtures/{yearend.xlsx,profiles.xlsx,payments.json} and are deterministic — do NOT regenerate them. The seeded test session_token (qa_test_session_token_20260427_stable) expires 2026-05-28; re-seed if it expires. Client DELETE endpoint does not exist (use PATCH archived=true).
